历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 15912, 15942, 15588, 16329, and 15507 respectively. Over the past five years, rankings fluctuated within the 15500–16300 range, with a baseline of about 15507 in 2025, showing an oscillating pattern with no clear unilateral trend. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Fujian was 88 in 2021, 83 in 2022, 92 in 2023, 91 in 2024, and 94 in 2025. In 2026, the Physics Category plan is 91 (with an additional 21 for Medical Science listed separately), a slight reduction of about 3.2% compared to 2025's 94, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it ranks 74th, with stable rankings in the 69–78 range in recent years, placing it among mid-to-upper tier 211 universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is generally positive, mainly due to increased exposure from sports honors such as the men's volleyball championship. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 43rd (relatively hot), with mid-to-high attention on short video platforms, which may slightly boost application enthusiasm. Food Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline (top in the country), directly corresponding to the Food Science and Engineering major in Physics Category admissions. Materials Science and Engineering is a 'Double First-Class' construction discipline, benefiting majors such as Polymer Materials and Engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information continue to be hot/highly recommended, matching the university's relevant admission majors. In 2026, the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in Fujian is about 204,000, an increase of approximately 6.2% from 192,000 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool. Nanchang University is located in Jiangxi Province, adjacent to Fujian Province, with relatively close geographical distance, making cross-provincial applications more acceptable. The university's enrollment plan in Fujian accounts for a small proportion (about 90+ students), representing a medium scale for out-of-province admissions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 15507, the slight 3.2% reduction in the 2026 Physics Category plan, the approximately 6.2% increase in Fujian Physics Category examinees, and the generally positive reputation and popularity, the upward pressure on rankings from the expanded candidate pool and increased application enthusiasm outweighs the easing effect of the enrollment reduction. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 15510, with a range of 15010–16010.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2833, the 14.8% reduction in History Category enrollment plan for 2026, the approximately 6.1% increase in Fujian History Category examinees, and the slightly positive reputation heat, the mitigating effect of enrollment reduction on rankings and the pushing effect of candidate growth and heat increase offset each other. prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业历来是高考报考热门方向，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争激烈。南昌大学2026年在福建省医学类新增了医学影像学（AI双学位项目），该专业融合人工智能方 向，预计会吸引部分高分考生关注。福建省医学类招生规模整体有限，南昌大学医学类计划从2021年的12人逐步扩至2026年的21人，虽持续增加但总量仍较小，位次对计划变化较 为敏感。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算及近年位次趋势分析，预测2026年南昌大学医学类在福建省最低录取位次约为20446名，波动区间为20139名至20753名。扩招使位次略有下行压力，但新 增热门双学位专业对报考热度有一定提振，预计位次较2025年（19899名）小幅下降（更易进），整体保持平稳微降态势。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings of Nanchang University's medical category in Fujian Province over the past five years are: 13,154 in 2021, 14,921 in 2022, 10,382 in 2023, 19,561 in 2024, and 19,899 in 2025. In terms of enrollment plan, there were 12 students in 2021, 13 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 19 in 2024, and 20 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 enrollment plan is 21 students (an increase of 1 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 5%), with a moderate expansion intensity. From the ranking trend, there were large fluctuations from 2021 to 2023, and since 2024, the ranking has stabilized in the range of 19,500 to 19,900, showing an overall downward trend (easier to enter), which is basically consistent with the expansion pace.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a key construction university under the 211 Project and a national double first-class construction university, with comprehensive strength ranking among the top in the country. Its medical disciplines have multiple national first-class undergraduate major construction points such as clinical medicine and stomatology. Basic medicine has a first-level discipline doctoral program, leading in the field of medical education in Jiangxi Province, and also has a certain appeal to candidates outside the province.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have always been a popular direction for college entrance examinations, with core majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology being highly competitive. In 2026, Nanchang University added a new medical imaging (AI dual degree program) in the medical category in Fujian Province, which integrates artificial intelligence direction and is expected to attract some high-scoring candidates. The overall enrollment scale of medical categories in Fujian Province is limited. The medical category plan of Nanchang University has gradually expanded from 12 students in 2021 to 21 students in 2026. Although it continues to increase, the total amount is still small, and the ranking is relatively sensitive to plan changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the comprehensive M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and recent ranking trend analysis, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking of Nanchang University's medical category in Fujian Province in 2026 will be approximately 20,446, with a fluctuation range of 20,139 to 20,753. The expansion puts slight downward pressure on the ranking, but the addition of popular dual degree majors boosts the application enthusiasm to some extent. It is expected that the ranking will slightly decrease (easier to enter) compared to 2025 (19,899), maintaining an overall stable and slightly declining trend.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to take Tier 2 majors as the main force, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Stomatology and clinical medicine are the most competitive, and the ranking needs to be within 10,000 to be relatively safe. Among Tier 2 majors, basic medicine, pharmacy, and rehabilitation therapy have similar admission rankings and can be considered as key options. Nursing has the lowest admission threshold and is suitable as a safety choice.
